summary: Innovative and solutions-oriented Senior Software Engineer with over 8 years of experience in designing, developing, and deploying scalable web applications. Proven track record in leading cross-functional teams to deliver complex technical projects on time. Passionate about cloud architecture, performance optimization, and mentoring junior engineers.

highlights: Architected a scalable microservices ecosystem using Node.js and Docker, handling over 2M daily requests.
Mentored a team of 5 junior engineers, fostering a culture of continuous learning and code quality.
Reduced page load time by 40% through aggressive code splitting and implementation of an edge-caching strategy.
Spearheaded the migration from a monolithic application to AWS serverless architecture, reducing hosting costs by 30%.
Developed high-performance RESTful APIs to support a data-intensive dashboard used by Fortune 500 clients.
Integrated third-party payment gateways, processing over $10M in transactions securely.
Collaborated with UX/UI designers to implement accessible and responsive React components.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
highlights: President of the Computer Science Society

projects.name: E-Commerce Platform Redesign
projects.description: Led the frontend migration of a legacy e-commerce site to Next.js.
highlights: Implemented server-side rendering for better SEO.

projects.name: Open Source Analytics Library
projects.description: A lightweight analytics tracker for single-page applications.
